notifications.text: Dry season confirmed July 5–18. Excellent conditions for Borobudur sunrise and Komodo diving.
Borobudur sunrise tickets must be pre-booked — limited to 128 visitors per session. Book at least 2 weeks ahead.

changeLog.title: Nusa Penida day trip added
changeLog.detail: Added a day trip from Bali to Nusa Penida for Kelingking Beach and manta ray snorkeling at Manta Point.

changeLog.title: Komodo extended to 3 nights
changeLog.detail: Changed Komodo from 2 to 3 nights to include a liveaboard dive day and Pink Beach visit.

items.title: Arrive Ngurah Rai International Airport (DPS)
items.detail: Visa on Arrival (VoA) queue at immigration — USD 35 cash, valid 30 days. Can extend once for 30 more days.
items.directions: International arrivals, Terminal 2. VoA counter before immigration. Pick up Grab from designated rideshare zone outside arrivals.

items.title: Check In — Kerobokan Villa
items.detail: Private villa with pool in Kerobokan — quieter than Seminyak, easy access to both. IDR 1,200,000–2,000,000/night.
items.directions: Villa complex off Jalan Bumbak Dauh. 45 minutes from airport via Bypass Ngurah Rai.

items.title: Dinner at Sarong Restaurant
items.detail: Award-winning Pan-Asian cuisine in a stunning Indonesian heritage building. Mains IDR 180,000–350,000 ($11–22 USD). Reserve ahead.
items.directions: Jalan Petitenget 19X, Kerobokan. 10-minute walk or short Grab ride from villa.

items.title: Fast Boat to Nusa Penida from Sanur
items.detail: Fast boat crossing 45 minutes. Book round-trip through Rocky Fast Cruise — IDR 150,000/person each way. Multiple departures from 7am.
items.directions: Sanur Beach harbor. Take Grab from villa to Sanur (30 min). Board at designated pier, confirm return time with operator.

items.title: Kelingking Beach Viewpoint
items.detail: One of Bali's most dramatic clifftop viewpoints — a T-Rex-shaped peninsula with turquoise water below. The descent to the beach is extremely steep (not for everyone). The viewpoint alone is worth the visit.
items.directions: Hire a driver from Toyapakeh harbor — IDR 400,000–600,000 for a full day. Kelingking is 45 min drive west.

items.title: Manta Point Snorkeling
items.detail: Year-round manta ray encounters in crystal clear water. Giant oceanic mantas with 3–5m wingspan. Book through Crystal Divers in Toyapakeh — IDR 250,000/person includes snorkel gear.
items.directions: Manta Point is 20 minutes by boat from Toyapakeh. Dive shop arranges boat transfer.

items.title: Private Transfer to Ubud
items.detail: Hire private driver for Bali → Ubud transfer (1.5 hrs). Book through villa. IDR 250,000–350,000 per vehicle.
items.directions: Driver picks up from villa. Route via Bypass and Ubud Road. Traffic can add 30 minutes on weekdays.

items.title: Check In — Komaneka at Bisma
items.detail: Luxury resort in the Bisma Valley with infinity pool views over the jungle. From IDR 3,500,000/night. Breakfast included.
items.directions: Jalan Bisma, Ubud. 5 minutes from Ubud central market by foot.

items.title: Campuhan Ridge Walk
items.detail: Free 9km jungle ridge walk with rice paddy and valley views. Start from the Pura Gunung Lebah temple. Best in afternoon light.
items.directions: Walk or take Grab to Jalan Raya Campuhan. Follow the ridge path north. Returns to Ubud center via Jalan Raya Campuhan.

items.title: Flight: Bali (DPS) → Yogyakarta (YIA)
items.detail: Lion Air or Batik Air, ~1 hour. From IDR 400,000 one-way. Yogyakarta International Airport is 45km from the city center.
items.directions: DPS international terminal. Check in 90 minutes before departure. Take Damri shuttle bus or Grab from YIA to city center (45 min).

items.title: Prambanan Temple at Sunset
items.detail: UNESCO World Heritage Site — spectacular 9th-century Hindu temple complex dedicated to the Trimurti. Admission IDR 350,000 ($22 USD). Sunset visits are magical — arrive at 4pm.
items.directions: 17km east of Yogyakarta center. Take Grab (IDR 40,000–60,000) or Trans-Jogja Bus route 1A.

items.title: Borobudur Sunrise Tour
items.detail: The world's largest Buddhist temple, built in the 9th century. Sunrise access limited to 128 visitors — pre-booking essential. Admission IDR 750,000 with sunrise access. Mist burns off by 8am revealing stunning volcanic panorama.
items.directions: 40km northwest of Yogyakarta. Guided tour van picks up at hotel at 4am. Temple opens for sunrise access at 6am.

items.title: Batik Making Workshop, Yogyakarta
items.detail: Half-day batik workshop at a family-run studio near Beringharjo Market. IDR 150,000–250,000 includes materials and a piece to take home. Learn the traditional wax-resist dyeing technique.
items.directions: Book through your hotel or directly at workshops on Jalan Tirtodipuran. Walk or take becak (cycle rickshaw) from the Kraton area.

items.title: Flight: Yogyakarta → Labuan Bajo (LBJ)
items.detail: Garuda or Lion Air via Bali, ~3.5 hours total. From IDR 800,000. Labuan Bajo Airport is 2km from town.
items.directions: Book connecting flight or direct if available. Grab taxi from LBJ airport to hotel (IDR 50,000).

items.title: Komodo Dragon Viewing Tour
items.detail: Guided boat tour to Komodo Island or Rinca Island. Komodo National Park entrance fee IDR 250,000 (weekday) / IDR 500,000 (weekend). Rangers accompany all visits — do not stray from the path. Dragons can move surprisingly fast.
items.directions: Book through hotel or Labuan Bajo harbor tour operators. Day boats depart 8am–2pm from the main harbor. Includes Komodo, Pink Beach, and snorkeling.

items.title: Flight: Labuan Bajo → Bali (DPS) → Onward
items.detail: Connecting flight via Bali. Minimum 2-hour connection at DPS. Pre-arrange luggage storage at DPS if needed.
items.directions: LBJ airport is 2km from Labuan Bajo center — take Grab or arrange through hotel. International departures from DPS Terminal 2.
